mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.title AS title, p.content AS content, p.answer_status AS answerStatus, p.category_code AS categoryCode, c.name AS categoryName, p.loginID AS loginID, u.name AS writerName, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt, p.fil_ori_name AS filOriName, p.fil_sav_name AS filSavName, p.extends AS extendsName, p.size AS size, p.logical_path AS logicalPath, p.physical_path AS physicalPath, p.is_deleted AS isDeleted, p.request_target AS requestTarget, u2.name AS requestTargetName FROM qna_post p JOIN qna_category c ON p.category_code = c.category_code JOIN tb_userinfo u ON p.loginID = u.loginID LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u2 ON p.request_target = u2.loginID WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} AND p.is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna_post (title, answer_status, content, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at, category_code, loginID, request_target, fil_ori_name, fil_sav_name, extends, size, logical_path, physical_path) VALUES (#{title}, #{answerStatus}, #{content}, #{isDeleted}, NOW(), NOW(), #{categoryCode}, #{loginID}, #{requestTarget}, #{filOriName}, #{filSavName}, #{extendsName}, #{size}, #{logicalPath}, #{physicalPath})
mapper.select: SELECT category_code AS categoryCode, name AS categoryName FROM qna_category
mapper.update: UPDATE qna_post SET is_deleted = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}

UPDATE qna_post
title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, request_target = #{requestTarget}, updated_at = NOW(),
fil_ori_name = #{filOriName}, fil_sav_name = #{filSavName}, `extends` = #{extendsName}, size = #{size}, logical_path = #{logicalPath}, physical_path = #{physicalPath},
WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT loginID as id, name FROM tb_userinfo WHERE user_type = 'I' AND name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(name)) > 0
